name: create_single_pass_run
short_description: Exports an intelligent design run result into a single run for the current project
full_help:
create_single_pass_run

Description: 
Exports an intelligent design run result into a single run for the current project

Syntax: 
create_single_pass_run  -reference_run <arg> [-quiet] [-verbose] <name>

Returns: 
run object

Usage: 
  Name            Description
  ---------------------------
  -reference_run  Intelligent design run for which the result has to be 
                  exported into a single run
  [-quiet]        Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]      Suspend message limits during command execution
  <name>          Name for new run

Categories: 
Project

arguments.description: Intelligent design run for which the result has to be exported into a single run
Suspend message limits during command execution
